blurb: Corporal Aldric Voss is the marine nobody worries about because he never gives them reason to — quiet, professional, does the job and goes back to reading. He treats combat the same way he treats cleaning his kit: thoroughly, and without drama.
speech_quirks: answers questions in as few words as accuracy allows, cleans and checks gear as a form of thinking, doesn't fill silences, calm reassurance delivered like a fact rather than comfort
elevenlabs_voice: Male, early 30s. Quiet, even baritone, unshowy. Neutral accent, minimal inflection, economical phrasing. Pacing is steady and unhurried across every stress level, sentences short and complete. Texture: smooth, low, breath controlled and quiet. Delivery is calm and matter-of-fact by default; his stillness under fire is the whole personality.
